sources.name: rosetta-shape-core
sources.purpose: Ecosystem navigation hub and symbolic ontology — bridges shapes to sensors, emotions, defenses, and protocols. Provides shape.seed.schema for seed geometry grounding.

sources.name: geometric-to-binary-bridge
sources.purpose: Translates physical reality into binary through five domain encoders (magnetic, light, sound, gravity, electric). Provides seed expansion via octahedral amplitude vectors, φ-resonance analysis, trojan detection, and the convergence vector that replaces simulated environment sensing with real geometric sensing.

sources.name: living-intelligence-database
sources.purpose: Ontology of living intelligences across biological (animal, plant), material (crystal), energetic (plasma, energy), and geometric (shape) domains. Agents consult this as a wisdom library — each entity teaches a pattern (octopus: distributed cognition, mycelium: symbiotic exchange, quartz: piezoelectric resonance). Cross-domain links (geometry_link, resonance, synergy) map to kernel resonance and trait families. Expander rules encode combinatorial emergence.
